comments.author: backlog
comments.text: Iteration 17 partial progress: agents-menu/state no longer scans Ralph loop state synchronously. Ownership is preloaded asynchronously before /agents UI and tool-description refresh paths consume the cached session-policy view. Remaining work is sync project settings I/O in agents-menu/state plus the many sync runtime/UI file accesses in src/autoresearch/index.ts.
